_comment_discord: Discord tension loop — OhAI~ asks, the bot answers via Llama.
_comment_discord2: OhAI~ posts crystallized remainders to the webhook as questions.
_comment_discord3: The bot intercepts ∿ posts, calls Llama, and routes the response back via /tension.
_comment_discord4: Stone's Law: 0 ≠ 1 — we struggle to learn when we post against ourselves.
_comment_llama: The discord bot reads LLAMA_URL and LLAMA_MODEL from env vars.
